'''larate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:irreligiously|irreligiously]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-r-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:irreligiously|irreligiously]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| larate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:larate|larate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:laratesher|laratesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:laratesherĂ«m|laratesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:laratero|laratero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:larateshĂ«|larateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:larateshĂ«m|larateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilaratero|gokilaratero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilarateshĂ«|gokilarateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilarateshĂ«m|gokilarateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golarankerom|golarankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golarankeshĂ«|golarankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golarankeshĂ«m|golarankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golarankeya|golarankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:laraterom|laraterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:laratemu|laratemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:larateya|larateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilaraterom|gokilaraterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilaratemu|gokilaratemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilarateya|gokilarateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:lararate|lararate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lararatesher|lararatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lararatesherĂ«m|lararatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lararatero|lararatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lararateshĂ«|lararateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lararateshĂ«m|lararateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilararatero|gokilararatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilararateshĂ«|gokilararateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilararateshĂ«m|gokilararateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golararankerom|golararankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golararankeshĂ«|golararankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golararankeshĂ«m|golararankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golararankeya|golararankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lararaterom|lararaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lararatemu|lararatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lararateya|lararateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilararaterom|gokilararaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilararatemu|gokilararatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilararateya|gokilararateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:lĂŠrĂŠte|lĂŠrĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lĂŠrĂŠtesher|lĂŠrĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠrĂŠtesherĂ«m|lĂŠrĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠrĂŠtero|lĂŠrĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«|lĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m|lĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠrĂŠtero|gokilĂŠrĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«|gokilĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m|gokilĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golĂŠrĂŠnkerom|golĂŠrĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«|golĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«m|golĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golĂŠrĂŠnkeya|golĂŠrĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠrĂŠterom|lĂŠrĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠrĂŠtemu|lĂŠrĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lĂŠrĂŠteya|lĂŠrĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠrĂŠterom|gokilĂŠrĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠrĂŠtemu|gokilĂŠrĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilĂŠrĂŠteya|gokilĂŠrĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:lafrafte|lafrafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lafraftesher|lafraftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafraftesherĂ«m|lafraftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafraftero|lafraftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lafrafteshĂ«|lafrafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafrafteshĂ«m|lafrafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafraftero|gokilafraftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilafrafteshĂ«|gokilafrafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafrafteshĂ«m|gokilafrafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golafrafnkerom|golafrafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golafrafnkeshĂ«|golafrafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golafrafnkeshĂ«m|golafrafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golafrafnkeya|golafrafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafrafterom|lafrafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafraftemu|lafraftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lafrafteya|lafrafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafrafterom|gokilafrafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafraftemu|gokilafraftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilafrafteya|gokilafrafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
